name: Sour Cream Yellow Squash
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup green onions, sliced (remove tops and bottoms)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook squash in a small amount of water until just tender.
2. Drain the squash, mash slightly, then drain again.
3. Combine mashed squash with sour cream, 1/4 cup butter, onions, salt, and pepper.
4. Place mixture in a buttered 1-quart casserole dish.
5. Mix together bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese; toss with 1/4 cup melted butter.
6. Sprinkle topping over squash.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for 25 minutes, or until bubbly. Serves 6.
